CustomField.description: Structured output from NEPA_Challenge_Predictor flow. Records each rule evaluated, its fired/not-fired status, cleared/open status, and risk delta contribution. Format: one rule per line — RuleLabel | Priority | Status (Fired/Not Fired) | Cleared/Open | +N pts. Populated on every run; overwritten on re-evaluation. Used by the Challenge Prediction Panel in the Risk Intelligence section.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Challenge Predictor rule evaluation results. Updated each time the flow runs.
CustomField.label: Challenge Prediction Basis
